title: Valve replaces a stolen Steam Machine and prepares a price increase
summary: The company continues to support its Steam Machine console with operational and price changes.

title: Xiaomi integrates a humanoid robot into its car factory after its training period
summary: The automaton has completed its training and now works full-time in vehicle production.

title: Alibaba launches open source AI model Qwen 3.8 and challenges industry leaders
summary: The new Chinese model poses a challenge to the United States' advantage in artificial intelligence.
